title: diuris × sulfurella
intro: Diuris × sulfurella, also known as the Golden Donkey Orchid, is a rare and hybrid species of orchid that is endemic to the southeastern regions of Australia. The plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its high content of flavonoids and glycosides. The Golden Donkey Orchid has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of these conditions, offering relief from coughing and congestion, and is also believed to have anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are used to harness its medicinal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
